stemHtml: What does a successful “logon procedure” mean on the flight deck? It enables…

options.a: Voice communications to be established between the aircraft and an aeronautical ground station.
options.b: A CPDLC connection to be established between an ATS unit and the aircraft.
options.c: Activation of the Mode S capability of the aircraft.
options.d: Radar identification of the aircraft by ATC.
